# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    age        = now - insert_time
    frequency  = total access count while resident
    recency    = now - last_access_time
    size       = item size (1 in the uniform-cost experiments)
    cache_size = capacity (constant within a run)
    now        = current logical timestamp
    """
    # Optimized weighting:
    # - frequency * 3.0: Strongly favors items with proven history (helps stable_frequency & churn)
    # - 4.0 / (recency + 1): High priority for recently accessed items (helps temporal_locality)
    # - 0.1 * age: Light, constant penalty for very old items (prevents scan/workload drift without hurting stable)
    # This balances the trade-off: Stable items (high freq, high age) stay; Old unused items (low freq, high age/recency) go.
    return (frequency * 3.0) + (4.0 / (recency + 1)) - (0.1 * age)
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
